userGuide.title: VoiceLink user guide
userGuide.intro: Send a WhatsApp voice note. VoiceLink logs it into your CRM for you — no forms, no clicking, no logging in. Built around one principle: VoiceLink asks when it isn't sure, instead of guessing.

quickStart.title: In 30 seconds

steps.title: Open WhatsApp
steps.body: Chat with the VoiceLink number your admin gave you.

steps.title: Record a voice note
steps.body: Speak naturally — like you're dictating to a colleague.

steps.title: Read the reply
steps.body: Simple messages get a confirmation; ambiguous or multi-task ones get a short plan to confirm first.

quickStart.calloutQuote: "I just met Jan at Delta NV. They want a 15% discount on the premium package. Create a follow-up task for next Friday, and add Sarah Leclercq — she's their new procurement manager."
quickStart.calloutSummaryBold: one meeting report, one deal update, one task, and one new contact

cheatSheet.title: What you can do
cheatSheet.introSuffix: . Speak naturally. Combine several actions in one voice note — VoiceLink reads the full message at once, plans the order itself, and links the records correctly.

rows.example: "Add a new company called Finit Solutions, VAT number BE0123456789"
"Add Sarah Leclercq at Delta NV, she's the procurement manager"
"Create a deal for Alpha Solutions — Website Redesign, 3-month project"
"I just called Marc for 15 minutes about the contract renewal"
"I had a meeting with Jan. We discussed pricing. He wants a discount."
"Schedule a meeting with Jan and Marc next Tuesday at 14:00"
"Remind me to send the proposal to Jan next Friday — urgent"
"Create an offerte for Alpha Solutions with the standard package"
"Show me all deals for Delta NV" / "Find contacts at Alpha"
"The SEO contract is won" / "We lost the consulting project"

dos.title: Use real names
dos.body: "Delta NV", "Jan de Vos", "Website Redesign" — specific beats vague.

dos.title: Add one distinguishing detail
dos.body: "Marc at Delta" beats "Marc" when a name could be ambiguous. If you don't, VoiceLink will ask.

dos.title: Speak naturally about dates
dos.body: "Next Friday", "tomorrow at 3", "end of the month", "Monday at 10am" all work.

dos.title: Mark urgent work
dos.body: Say "urgent" or "ASAP" for high-priority tasks. Otherwise default priority applies.

dos.title: Use your own language
dos.body: Dutch, English, French, German, Spanish, Italian or Portuguese — VoiceLink detects the language and replies in the same one.

dos.title: Be explicit when you're unsure
dos.body: "Maybe Thomas, or could be Tom" → VoiceLink leaves the name blank and notes the uncertainty in remarks. It will not guess.

donts.title: Worry about syntax
donts.body: There aren't any keywords — speak the way you think.

donts.title: Monologue for 5 minutes
donts.body: Voice notes of 15–60 seconds work best.

donts.title: Rely on pronouns across gaps
donts.body: After ~10 minutes of silence, VoiceLink starts a fresh conversation.

donts.title: Attach files
donts.body: VoiceLink only reads voice and text — no images, PDFs, or attachments.

talkingBack.title: How VoiceLink replies
talkingBack.whenNeedsToAsk: When VoiceLink is unsure about something specific
confirmations: ✅ Contact Sarah Leclercq created, linked to Delta NV
✅ Task "Follow up with Jan" created — due Friday
✅ Deal updated: premium package, 15% discount noted

dialogues.voicelink: "I found Jan Voortman at Delta and Jan Hendrickx at Finit. Which one?"
"A contact named Jane Smith already exists. Update her instead?"
"BE0123… is registered as 'Finit Solutions NV'. Correct?"
"Demo in May — when exactly? Or shall I create a task to schedule it?"

talkingBack.fuzzyMatchNote: Small typos, transcription mistakes, different spellings — VoiceLink matches on sound + spelling. "Marc Pieters" still finds "Marc Peeters" without asking.

memory.title: Context & memory
memory.withinRest: (~10 min active): VoiceLink remembers the last 5 exchanges. You can say "her", "that company", "yes do it" and it knows who or what you mean.
memory.silentRest: : the context resets to keep things clean. Name your entities explicitly in your next message.
memory.acrossRest: : VoiceLink doesn't carry past chats forward — but your Teamleader data is persistent (that's where it lives).

preview.title: Forcing a preview when you want one
preview.intro: Plan-preview is automatic for ambiguous and multi-task messages. For straightforward single-task messages it executes directly. To force a preview on something that would otherwise auto-execute:
preview.quote: "Show me what you would do, but don't execute yet."
preview.planNote: You'll get the same 📌 plan format. Then:

items.title: Send emails
items.body: Quotations and invoices are prepared in Teamleader; you send them from there.

items.title: Attach files
items.body: PDFs, images, contracts via WhatsApp — voice and text only.

items.title: Schedule messages for later
items.body: "Send this at 3pm" won't work — VoiceLink acts immediately.

items.title: Bulk-edit 30+ records
items.body: Safety limit on a single message.

items.title: Undo after the fact
items.body: But you can say "delete the task I just created" as a follow-up.

rows.fix: Resend the voice note, or contact support.
Add a detail: "Jan at Delta", "Marc Peeters". Next time it'll ask if it sees the same ambiguity.
Reply in your language — it'll lock in again.
Use the exact field label as in Teamleader, or ask your admin.
Resend the original message; VoiceLink will re-plan and ask again.

rows.cause: Past — fixed; please report any new occurrence

cards.label: The one rule
cards.body: Speak to VoiceLink the way you'd speak to a colleague who has full Teamleader access.

cards.label: The one trick
cards.body: When in doubt, name things explicitly. VoiceLink will ask if it isn't sure — but you save a turn by being specific upfront.

cards.label: The one habit
cards.body: Read the 📌 plan when it appears. Confirm or adjust before it acts.

support.title: Need help?
support.body: Email alex@finitsolutions.be for support. Send /feedback <description> from WhatsApp for bug reports or feature requests, or email with the approximate time of the voice note. Reply "STOP" on WhatsApp to stop service updates.

guidePreview.title: Just say what happened.
guidePreview.subtitle: No keywords, no syntax. Speak the way you'd tell a colleague — VoiceLink turns it into the right CRM actions.

examples.youSay: "Just met Jan at Delta NV. They want a 15% discount on the premium package. Follow up with him next Friday."
outcomes: Meeting report logged on Delta NV
Task "Follow up with Jan" created — due Friday

examples.youSay: "Add Sarah Leclercq as a contact at Delta NV, she's the new procurement manager."
outcomes: Linked to Delta NV with role "Procurement Manager"

examples.youSay: "I just called Marc Peeters for 15 minutes about the contract renewal. He wants a new quote by Friday."
outcomes: Call logged on Marc Peeters — 15 min
Task "Prepare new quote for Marc" created — due Friday

examples.youSay: "The SEO contract with Alpha Solutions is won."

tips: Use real names — "Delta NV" beats "that company".
Combine several actions in one message — VoiceLink orders them.
Speak any of 4 languages: EN / NL / FR / DE.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.subtitle: From voice message to your CRM in four steps

step1.title: Send a message
step1.description: Open WhatsApp and send a voice note or text — just like you normally would. Add new info to your CRM or look up existing contacts and deals.

step2.title: VoiceLink picks out the info
step2.description: VoiceLink spots the key info — names, numbers, appointments, notes — and figures out what to do with it.

step3.title: You get a summary
step3.description: Instantly get an overview back in WhatsApp. VoiceLink also thinks ahead: it can ask questions or suggest next steps.

step4.title: Everything is in your CRM
step4.description: Contacts, notes and tasks show up automatically in your CRM. Done.

coreFunctionalities.title: Core Functionalities
coreFunctionalities.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your CRM by voice

contactManagement.title: Contact Management
contactManagement.description: Create new contacts or update existing ones by simply speaking their name, phone, and email. VoiceLink automatically searches for existing records.

calendarTasks.title: Calendar & Tasks
calendarTasks.description: Schedule callbacks, appointments, and tasks with natural language. Say "Call him back Monday at 3 PM" and VoiceLink creates the task automatically.

smartExtraction.title: Smart Data Extraction
smartExtraction.description: AI captures key conversation details, interests, and action items. Automatically creates tags and annotations in your CRM.

autoScheduling.title: Intelligent Scheduling
autoScheduling.description: No time mentioned? VoiceLink finds suitable time slots automatically and syncs with your calendar.

customIntegration.description: Need more? From quotes and work orders to invoices and beyond - we'll build custom voice workflows tailored to your business.

problemAgitation.title: Sound familiar?
problemAgitation.subtitle: Sales teams lose hours every week on manual CRM work.
problemAgitation.pain1: You forget to log calls in your CRM because you're already on the next one.
problemAgitation.pain2: Notes from client meetings live in your head — or on a napkin.
problemAgitation.pain3: Your pipeline looks outdated because updating it takes too long.
problemAgitation.pain4: Follow-ups slip through the cracks and deals go cold.

integrations.title: Works with your CRM
integrations.subtitle: Connect in one click, no configuration needed, installed in 2 minutes.

testimonials.title: What our users say
testimonials.quote1: VoiceLink cut my admin time in half. I just talk, and my CRM stays up to date.
testimonials.quote2: Finally, a tool that works how I work — on the road, between meetings.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Send a WhatsApp voice note or text message to VoiceLink. Our AI understands what you mean and automatically syncs the right actions to your CRM — contacts, tasks, notes, meetings, and more. The whole process takes less than 30 seconds.
faq.q2: Do I need to install an app?
faq.a2: No. VoiceLink works entirely through WhatsApp, which you already have on your phone. Add our VoiceLink number as a contact, verify your number once, and you're ready to go. No extra app, no new password.
faq.a3: About 2 minutes. Connect your CRM with one click, verify your WhatsApp number, and you're done. No technical knowledge or IT support needed.
faq.q4: How does VoiceLink know what I mean?
faq.a4: VoiceLink automatically recognizes names, companies, deals, and other data already in your CRM. It links your message to the right contact or record automatically. If something doesn't exist yet, VoiceLink can create it for you.
faq.a5: Yes. VoiceLink is built in compliance with European GDPR regulations. We use OAuth for CRM connections, encrypt all data in transit, and never store your voice recordings after processing.
faq.q6: What does VoiceLink cost after the free trial?
faq.a6: After your 1-Month Free Trial, choose a plan that fits your usage and team size. Transparent pricing, no hidden costs, cancel monthly. No credit card required for the trial.
faq.q7: Does VoiceLink work in multiple languages?
faq.a7: Yes. VoiceLink understands virtually all languages. You can speak or type in whichever language feels most natural — Dutch, English, French, German, Spanish, and more. VoiceLink always responds in the same language you used.

hero.title: How can we help?
hero.subtitle: Our team is ready to help you get the most out of VoiceLink. Reach out anytime — we typically respond within a few hours.

email.title: Email us
email.description: Send us a detailed message and we'll get back to you with a thorough response.

phone.title: Call us
phone.description: Prefer to talk? Give us a call for direct, personal support.

form.title: Contact form
form.description: Fill in our contact form and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

setup.q: How do I get started with VoiceLink?
setup.a: Getting started takes about 2 minutes. Sign up, connect your CRM via OAuth, and verify your WhatsApp number. Once verified, you can start sending voice notes and text messages to VoiceLink right away.

whatsapp.q: I'm not receiving the WhatsApp verification code
whatsapp.a: Make sure you entered your number with the correct country code (e.g. +32 for Belgium). Check that your WhatsApp is active and connected to the internet. If you still don't receive the code, try again after a few minutes or contact us directly.

crm.q: Which CRM platforms does VoiceLink support?
crm.a: VoiceLink currently integrates with Teamleader, Pipedrive, and Odoo. We're actively working on adding more platforms. Let us know which CRM you use and we'll keep you updated.

languages.a: VoiceLink understands virtually all languages. You can send voice notes or text messages in Dutch, English, French, German, Spanish, and many more. VoiceLink always responds in the same language you used.

billing.a: After your 1-Month Free Trial, choose a plan that fits your needs. All plans are billed monthly and can be cancelled at any time. No credit card is required to start your trial.

data.a: Absolutely. VoiceLink is built in full compliance with European GDPR regulations. We use OAuth for CRM connections, encrypt all data in transit, and never store your voice recordings after processing.

accordion.title: Program details
accordion.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the VoiceLink Partner Program

commission.title: 1. Commission
commission.content:
Partner receives 20% recurring commission on the monthly subscription value (MRR) of each referred customer, as long as that customer is active and paying.

Commission is calculated on the net MRR (excluding VAT, after any discounts).

Payout occurs quarterly, after receipt of an invoice from the partner. At 5+ active customers, we switch to monthly payouts.

attribution.title: 2. Attribution and lead registration
attribution.content:
Partner registers a lead by sending an email to voicelink@finitsolutions.be with name, company and context. Date of receipt serves as the starting point.

Attribution window: 90 days. If the lead signs up within 90 days of registration, the commission goes to the partner.

In case of duplicate registration (two partners refer the same lead), the first registered partner counts.

roles.title: 3. Role distribution
roles.content:
Partner: introduces prospects from their own network and can give demos using materials provided by Finit Solutions (pitch deck, demo videos, one-pager, FAQ).

Prospects self-onboard via the self-service portal at voicelink.me. Partner can optionally give a demo, but the customer activates the product themselves.

Finit Solutions: handles the product, marketing and sales materials, onboarding flow, support, billing and product development.

The end customer has a direct contractual relationship with Finit Solutions. Partner has no access to customer data, voice notes or CRM content.

pricing.title: 4. Pricing and discounts
pricing.content:
Finit Solutions determines the price. Partner communicates the official pricing, and discounts or promotions are always granted by Finit Solutions.

Partners with at least one active paying customer in the past quarter retain free access to their own VoiceLink account for dogfooding and demo purposes.

duration.title: 5. Duration and termination
duration.content:
This agreement is valid for an indefinite period and may be terminated by either party in writing with 30 days' notice.

Upon termination, recurring commission continues on existing customers for up to 12 months after termination. New registrations expire immediately.

exclusivity.title: 6. Exclusivity and non-compete
exclusivity.content:
No exclusivity: both parties are free to collaborate with other parties.

Non-circumvention: partner may not build, promote or resell a competing product that directly competes with VoiceLink in the CRM voice automation market during the term and 12 months after termination.

gdpr.title: 7. GDPR and confidentiality
gdpr.content:
Finit Solutions is the data controller for all customer data. Partner processes no personal data in connection with this cooperation.

Both parties treat commercial information (pipeline, pricing, customer names) confidentially.

form.name: Full name

form.success: Thank you! We'll get in touch soon.

calendly.info: If you have any questions, reach us at voicelink@finitsolutions.be. We respond within 24 hours.
